fields.biography: A General Surgeon is a medical doctor who specializes in performing surgical procedures to treat a wide range of conditions affecting various parts of the body. Their expertise covers surgeries involving the abdomen (such as appendix, gallbladder, hernia), breast, skin, soft tissues, and sometimes emergency trauma cases.

fields.name: APOLLO HOSPITALS
fields.description: Apollo Hospitals is a leading integrated healthcare provider in Asia, known for its vast network of hospitals, pharmacies, and clinics
fields.about: A clinic is a healthcare facility focused on outpatient care, meaning patients receive treatment and return home the same day. Clinics differ from hospitals in that they don't typically offer overnight stays or emergency care and often specialize in specific areas of medicine.

fields.name: Pathology Tests
fields.description: Pathology tests involve the examination of blood, urine, tissues, and other body samples to detect diseases, monitor health conditions, and guide treatment. These tests can include routine screenings (like complete blood count), infection detection, and advanced molecular diagnostics. They are essential for accurate diagnosis, early disease detection, and monitoring treatment effectiveness.

fields.name: Radiology & Imaging
fields.description: Radiology and imaging involve the use of advanced technology to capture detailed images of the body’s internal structures for diagnosis, monitoring, and treatment planning. Techniques such as X-rays, MRI, CT scans, and ultrasounds help detect injuries, monitor diseases, guide surgeries, and evaluate treatment effectiveness, often without the need for invasive procedures.

fields.name: Radiology & Imaging
fields.description: Radiology and imaging involve the use of advanced technology to capture detailed images of the body’s internal structures for diagnosis, monitoring, and treatment planning. Techniques such as X-rays, MRI, CT scans, and ultrasounds help detect injuries, monitor diseases, guide surgeries, and evaluate treatment effectiveness, often without the need for invasive procedures.

fields.name: Complete Blood Count (CBC)
fields.description: Measures various components of blood to assess overall health and detect a variety of disorders.
fields.parameters_included: Hemoglobin, WBC count, RBC count, Platelets, Hematocrit

fields.name: Urine Routine & Microscopy
fields.description: Analyzes urine to detect metabolic, kidney, or urinary tract disorders.
fields.parameters_included: Color, Specific gravity, pH, Protein, Glucose, Microscopic sediment examination

fields.name: Tissue Biopsy Examination
fields.description: Examines tissue samples under a microscope to detect cancer, infections, or other diseases.

fields.name: X-ray Chest
fields.description: Uses low-dose X-ray technology to capture images of the chest, helping diagnose lung, heart, and chest wall conditions.

fields.name: MRI BRAIN
fields.description: Uses magnetic fields and radio waves to create detailed images of brain tissues and structures, useful in diagnosing strokes, tumors, and neurological disorders.
fields.parameters_included: Brain MRI sequences (T1, T2, FLAIR, DWI, etc.)

fields.name: CT Abdomen
fields.description: Uses X-ray and computer technology to create detailed cross-sectional images of the abdominal organs for diagnosis of tumors, infections, or injuries.
fields.parameters_included: Axial, coronal, and sagittal abdominal images

fields.name: Ultrasound Pelvis
fields.description: Uses high-frequency sound waves to visualize pelvic organs, commonly used in gynecology, urology, and pregnancy assessments.
fields.parameters_included: Real-time pelvic organ images (uterus, ovaries, bladder, etc.)

fields.name: Trauma Screening Package
fields.description: A combined imaging package designed to quickly assess trauma patients for fractures, internal injuries, and organ damage.
fields.parameters_included: X-ray Chest, CT Abdomen, Ultrasound Pelvis

fields.name: Pregnancy Imaging Package RIP002
fields.description: A set of imaging tests to monitor fetal growth, maternal health, and pregnancy progress

fields.name: Full Body Imaging Package
fields.description: A comprehensive imaging package for preventive health check-ups, detecting hidden diseases and structural abnormalities.
fields.parameters_included: MRI Brain, X-ray Chest, Ultrasound Abdomen & Pelvis

fields.name: Antibiotics
fields.description: Medicines that kill or stop the growth of bacteria, used to treat bacterial infections.

fields.name: Analgesics (Pain Relievers)
fields.description: Medicines that reduce or relieve pain without causing loss of consciousness.

fields.name: Antipyretics
fields.description: Medicines that help reduce fever and provide comfort during infections.

fields.name: Amoxicillin 500mg Capsules
fields.description: Broad-spectrum antibiotic used to treat bacterial infections such as pneumonia, ear infections, and throat infections.

fields.name: Paracetamol 500mg Tablets
fields.description: Common pain reliever and fever reducer, suitable for headaches, muscle pain, and mild arthritis pain.

fields.name: Ibuprofen 200mg Tablets
fields.description: Nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) that reduces fever, pain, and inflammation in various conditions.
